exercises.name: Back Squat (Top Single)
exercises.notes: 3-5min Top set. Focus on technique and explosive power.

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: 3-5min Sit back and down, keep your upper back tight to the bar

exercises.name: Barbell Overhead Press
exercises.notes: 2-3min These are intentionally light for shoulder stability and balance. Don't push these hard. Big bench day tomorrow.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: N/A 2-3min Set the pins high, short ROM, use low bar position, set hips back and keep shins vertical

exercises.name: Chest-Supported Row
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Can use machine or brace against bench. Minimize cheating.

exercises.name: Strict Bench Press
exercises.notes: 3-5min Strict 1 second pause on chest. Execute the set up and rep as perfectly as possible. Don't overhype. Focus.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: 3-5min Set up a comfortable arch, quick pause on chest and explode up on each rep

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Focus on squeezing your hamstrings to move the weight

exercises.name: EZ-Bar Strict Curl
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Lean against wall and maintain wall contact with head, hips and back. Keep elbows pinned at sides. Control the weight.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Don't go too heavy, focus on mind-muscle connection

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Push these all very hard. Go to true failure.

exercises.name: Wide Stance Back Squat
exercises.notes: N/A 2-4min This is a pin squat that starts and ends with the bar on the pins. At the bottom you're just above parallel. Get tight.

exercises.name: Close Grip Bench Press
exercises.notes: N/A 2-4min Shoulder width grip, tuck your elbows in closer to your sides

exercises.name: Neutral Grip Pulldown
exercises.notes: N/A 2-3min Pull your elbows down against your sides

exercises.name: Tricep Pushdown
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Arc the dummbells behind your head. Constant tension on triceps

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.notes: 3-5min Brace your lats, chest tall, pull the slack out of the bar before lifting

exercises.name: Pause Deadlift
exercises.notes: 2-4min 1 second pause right after plates leave the floor

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Focus on contracting your delts to move the weight, don't let form get sloppy toward the end of the set!

exercises.name: Rear Delt Fly
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Mind-muscle connection with rear delts

exercises.name: Lat Pullover
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Use bands if no cables. Keep constant tension on the lats. Big stretch at the top by leaning slightly forward.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Keep elbows locked in place, squeeze the dumbbell handle hard!

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: 3-5min Sit back and down, keep your upper back tight to the bar

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: 3-5min Set up a comfortable arch, quick pause on chest and explode up on each rep

exercises.name: Bicep Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: N/A 2-3min Be mindful of lower back fatgiue, stay light and minimize cheating

exercises.name: Hip Abduction
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Machine, band or weighted, squeeze and hold for 1 second at the top of each rep

exercises.name: Touch-And-Go Deadlift
exercises.notes: 2-4min Don't bounce the plates off the floor, just a light tap. Allow some momentum and get in a good groove. Breathe/brace at the top.

exercises.name: Barbell Pin Bench Press
exercises.notes: 2-4min Set the pins just above chest height, release tension while the bar is on the pins, then explode up. Control the weight.

exercises.name: Neutral Grip Pulldown
exercises.notes: N/A 2-3min Pull your elbows down against your sides

exercises.name: Barbell Skull Crusher
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Arc the dummbells behind your head. Constant tension on triceps

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.notes: 3-5min Brace your lats, chest tall, pull the slack out of the bar before lifting

exercises.name: Touch-And-Go Deadlift
exercises.notes: 2-4min 1 second pause right after plates leave the floor

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Focus on contracting your delts to move the weight, don't let form get sloppy toward the end of the set!

exercises.name: Cable Rear Delt Fly
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Mind-muscle connection with rear delts

exercises.name: Dumbell Pullover
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Use bands if no cables. Keep constant tension on the lats. Big stretch at the top by leaning slightly forward.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Keep elbows locked in place, squeeze the dumbbell handle hard!

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: 3-5min Sit back and down, keep your upper back tight to the bar

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: 3-5min Set up a comfortable arch, quick pause on chest and explode up on each rep

exercises.name: Chest Supported Row
exercises.notes: N/A 2-3min Be mindful of lower back fatgiue, stay light and minimize cheating

exercises.name: Hip Abduction
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Machine, band or weighted, squeeze and hold for 1 second at the top of each rep

sessions.name: TAPER WEEK - LOCK IN TECHNIQUE AND PRIORITIZE RECOVERY WITH LOWER VOLUME

exercises.name: Exercise
exercises.notes: Warm-up Sets Load %1RM RPE Rest Notes

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: 3-5min Try to move the bar as explosively as possible on the positive. Approach with confidence. Technique locked. Don't overhype.

exercises.name: Strict Bench Press
exercises.notes: 3-5min Make every rep look exactly the same. 1 second pause on each rep.

exercises.name: Reset Deadlift
exercises.notes: 3-5min Stand up and set up again in between each rep. Think of each set as 3 separate singles.

exercises.name: Chest-Supported Row
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Can use machine or brace against bench. Minimize cheating.

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.notes: 3-5min Try to move the bar as explosively as possible on the positive. Approach with confidence. Technique locked. Don't overhype.

exercises.name: Barbell Overhead Press
exercises.notes: 2-3min These are intentionally light for shoulder stability and balance. Don't push these hard. Big bench day tomorrow.

exercises.name: Anderson Squat
exercises.notes: N/A 2-4min This is a pin squat that starts and ends with the bar on the pins. At the bottom you're just above parallel. Get tight.

exercises.name: Barbell (or EZ-Bar) Strict Curl
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Lean against wall and maintain wall contact with head, hips and back. Keep elbows pinned at sides. Control the weight.

exercises.name: Strict Bench Press
exercises.notes: 3-5min Try to move the bar as explosively as possible on the positive. Approach with confidence. Technique locked. Don't overhype.

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: 3-5min Sit back and down, keep your upper back tight to the bar

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curl
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Focus on squeezing your hamstrings to move the weight

exercises.name: Seated Face Pull
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Don't go too heavy, focus on mind-muscle connection

sessions.name: MAX TESTING OPTION A: Important! Choose either Week 10A or Week 10B. Do not run both weeks. See above for suggestions on which week to run.

exercises.name: Exercise
exercises.notes: Warm-up Sets Load %1RM RPE Rest Notes

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: 4-6min Aim for a new PR. Start with 100% and increase by ~2.5% every attempt until you hit a 9.5-10 RPE. Use a spotter and good form!

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Can be seated or lying. Focus on squeezing your hamstrings to move the weight

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Focus on contracting your delts to move the weight, don't let form get sloppy toward the end of the set!

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: 4-6min Aim for a new PR. Start with 100% and increase by ~2.5% every attempt until you hit a 9.5-10 RPE. Use a spotter and good form!

exercises.name: Barbell (or EZ-Bar) Strict Curl
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Lean against wall and maintain wall contact with head, hips and back. Keep elbows pinned at sides. Control the weight.

exercises.name: Barbell Overhead Press
exercises.notes: N/A 2-3min Press up and back overhead, slight pause on the chest on each rep

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.notes: 4-6min Aim for a new PR. Start with 100% and increase by ~2.5% every attempt until you hit a 9.5-10 RPE. Use a spotter and good form!

exercises.name: Chest-Supported Row
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Can use machine or brace against bench. Minimize cheating.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Skull Crusher
exercises.notes: N/A 1-2min Arc the dummbells behind your head. Constant tension on triceps
